news.t: VistaShares Introduces TPRY, the VistaShares Target 15™ TEPRTantrum Contrarian Distribution ETF (TPRY)

holdings.infoBox: TPRY is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 10.91%, Micron Technology at 10.20%, Sandisk at 6.83%, Alphabet at 6.34%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.18%.

overview.description: The VistaShares Target 15 TEPRTantrum Contrarian Distribution ETF (TPRY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund targets approximately 15% in annual cash distributions by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US stocks with an options overlay. The fund seeks income and, to a lesser extent, long-term capital appreciation. TPRY was launched on Feb 26, 2026 and is issued by VistaShares.

data.title: VistaShares Introduces TPRY, the VistaShares Target 15™ TEPRTantrum Contrarian Distribution ETF (TPRY)
data.text: BOSTON, Feb. 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- VistaShares, an innovative asset manager aiming to redefine thematic exposures and income strategies, today announced the launch of the VistaShares Target 15™...
